While there are noted minor issues regarding the omission of two specific URLs and corrupted heading tags in the latter half of the document, these are classified as minor cosmetic or structural defects. According to the scoring instructions, a fidelity composite above 0.85 with 'converge_with_minors' agreement is a strong signal for automated approval.
